part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add `useEventLogger` bool parameter to all Audit factory functions across the repository to enable event logging capability for audit backends

## Constraints & Preferences
- Task is complete when change is applied everywhere in the codebase
- Project must still typecheck after changes
- Pattern must be consistent with existing implementation in `audit_broker.go` (line 42 useEventLogger bool)

## Progress
### Done
- Identified location of existing useEventLogger parameter in audit_broker.go for reference pattern
- Listed vault directory structure and identified audit package contents
- Found 3 builtin audit backend Factory functions: syslog, file, socket backends in `builtin/audit/*/backend.go`
- Created task list to track progress on adding useEventLogger parameter

### In Progress
- Systematically reviewing all Audit factory function signatures to identify complete list
- Need to update each Factory function signature from `func Factory(ctx context.Context, conf *audit.BackendConfig) (audit.Backend, error)` to include useEventLogger parameter

## Key Decisions
- None yet - investigating full scope of factory functions that need updating

## Next Steps
1. Identify all remaining Audit factory functions across:
   - builtin/audit/*/backend.go (syslog, file, socket identified; need mysql, database backends if applicable)
   - helper/testhelpers/corehelpers/corehelpers.go
2. Update each Factory signature with `useEventLogger bool` parameter at end of config struct params
3. Pass useEventLogger to backend instances where applicable
4. Verify project typechecks after all changes applied

## Critical Context
- audit_broker.go already has useEventLogger pattern: `func (a *AuditBroker) Register(name string, b audit.Backend, local bool, useEventLogger bool)`
- Factory functions currently: `func Factory(ctx context.Context, conf *audit.BackendConfig) (audit.Backend, error)`
- Multiple builtin backends identified needing updates at `/Users/guygrigsby/workspace/vault/builtin/audit/syslog/backend.go`, `/Users/guygrigsby/workspace/vault/builtin/audit/file/backend.go`, `/Users/guygrigsby/workspace/vault/builtin/audit/socket/backend.go`
- Test helper Factory functions also need updating to maintain consistency

## Relevant Files
- vault/audit/audit.go: Backend interface and audit package definitions
- vault/audit_broker.go: reference implementation of useEventLogger pattern (line 42)
- builtin/audit/syslog/backend.go: Factory function to update
- builtin/audit/file/backend.go: Factory function to update  
- builtin/audit/socket/backend.go: Factory function to update
- helper/testhelpers/corehelpers/corehelpers.go: test helper Factory functions to update
